context_text: In my time I have been called many things: sister, lover, priestess, wise-woman, queen.
normalized_context_text: In my time I have been called many things: sister, lover, priestess, wise-woman, queen.
original_context_text: In my time I have been called many things: sister, lover, priestess, [[wise-woman]], queen.
rendered_context_text: In my time I have been called many things: sister, lover, priestess, wise-woman, queen.
subject: wise-woman

context_text: Now in truth I have come to be wise-woman, and a time may come when these things may need to be known.
normalized_context_text: Now in truth I have come to be wise-woman, and a time may come when these things may need to be known.
original_context_text: Now in truth I have come to be [[wise-woman]], and a time may come when these things may need to be known.
